full_text:
Sima Wei (Yandu) 司馬瑋 (彥度)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sima Wei (司馬瑋), styledYandu (彥度). The second of the Princes associated with the Turmoil of the Eight Princes. Sima Wei was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty.
